task: My baby boy was born on Dec 1, 2025. His weight is 7 lb 8 oz, height is 20 inches, and head circumference is 35 cm. The measurement date is Dec 1, 2025. Can you calculate his growth percentiles using a calculator?
graderReasoning: The agent reached BabyCenter’s growth percentile calculator page, entered the requested inputs (boy; birthday 12-01-2025; measurement date 12-01-2025; weight 7 lb 8 oz; height 20 in; head circumference 35 cm), clicked Calculate, and the resulting page visibly showed percentiles: Weight 55th, Height 69th, Head circumference 66th. Although the page also displayed an inconsistent '5 months old' label, the explicit percentile results for the entered measurements were visible on screen, and the agent accurately reported those values.
final_result_response:
I used BabyCenter’s “Growth chart: Baby weight and height percentile calculator” with:

- Boy
- Birthday: Dec 1, 2025
- Measurement date: Dec 1, 2025
- Weight: 7 lb 8 oz
- Length/height: 20 in
- Head circumference: 35 cm

Results:

- Weight: 55th percentile
- Length/height: 69th percentile
- Head circumference: 66th percentile

BabyCenter notes this is an educational tool, not a substitute for pediatrician tracking.
action_history: Opening BabyCenter: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.babycenter.com/');
Opening growth chart tool: await page.locator('e86').click();
Opening growth chart tool: await page.locator('e73').click();
Closing sign-up modal and inspecting page: await page.locator('e111').click();
Entering measurements in calculator: await page.locator('e119').fill('12-01-2025');
Entering measurements in calculator: await page.locator('e121').fill('12-01-2025');
Entering measurements in calculator: await page.locator('e123').fill('7');
Entering measurements in calculator: await page.locator('e125').fill('8');
Entering measurements in calculator: await page.locator('e126').fill('20');
Entering measurements in calculator: await page.locator('e128').fill('35');
